notes.min_version_code: App will show an upgrade prompt if installed version_code is below this value. Set to 0 to disable.
notes.force_update_version_code: App will block usage and force store redirect if installed version_code is below this value. Set to 0 to disable. Use only for critical security or data fixes.
notes.notice: Set active=true and provide message strings to push an in-app notice banner (e.g. upcoming maintenance, festival data update). Set active=false to suppress.
notes.update_procedure: To push a notice: set active=true, fill message strings, commit. To force a soft upgrade prompt: increase min_version_code to the new release. To hard-block old versions: set force_update_version_code. Always test on a dev build before committing.
